_comment: Central bank stances for G8 currencies. Update manually after each major CB meeting.

USD.notes: Fed held rates at 4.25-4.50%. Watching trade war inflation impact. Data-dependent stance.

EUR.notes: ECB in cutting cycle. Deposit rate at 2.25%. Growth concerns and disinflation support further cuts.

GBP.notes: BoE cut to 4.25% in May 2026. Gradual cutting cycle. Inflation still above target — cautious pace.

JPY.notes: BoJ normalizing from ultra-loose policy. Rate at 0.5%, signaling further gradual hikes. Hawkish relative to recent history.

AUD.notes: RBA cut rates in May 2026. Weak domestic demand and easing inflation support dovish stance.

CAD.notes: BoC in active cutting cycle. Trade war with US weighs on economy. Multiple cuts in 2025-26.

CHF.notes: SNB cut to 0.25%. Risk of returning to negative rates. Strong CHF concerns persist.

NZD.notes: RBNZ in cutting cycle. Weak domestic economy. Multiple rate cuts since late 2024.

XAU.notes: Gold — no CB. Use DXY trend and risk sentiment as fundamental context instead.
